Educational Programs in Partnership of KHAS Sports Studies Center and LALIGA Begin

An educational partnership agreement has been signed between Kadir Has University Sports Studies Center and LALIGA Business School. The first program to be organized within the scope of the agreement, “Business and Marketing in Football” will be held in April, and another program, “LALIGA Week: Madrid”, will be held in Madrid in May.

Within the scope of the educational partnership agreement signed between Kadir Has University Sports Studies Center and LALIGA Business School, many events and educational programs will be held. The educational programs, which will be open to participants who want to benefit from the trainings and international network opportunities given by the professionals of LALIGA, which is among the biggest football leagues in the world, also stand out because it will be organized for the first time in Turkey.

EARLY REGISTRATION PERIOD CONTINUES UNTIL MARCH 1

The early registration period for the first program to be held under the agreement,

“Business and Marketing in Football,”

has begun. The early registration period for the program, which has a quota of 40 people, will end on Friday, March 1, and the final registration period will end on Friday, March 22. The program, which will be held in April as an online education and will last for 4 weeks, will be in English. The program will include case studies as well as lessons.

A MADRID TOUR FULL OF CLUB VISITS, STADIUM MATCH ENJOYMENT AND EXPERIENCE TRANSFER

The

program, which will take place in Madrid in May, will be a comprehensive training and experience transfer program that will include trainings given by professionals as well as field visits, stadium tours, going to matches and similar experiences. The quota for this training, which will be held in Madrid between May 9-13, will be 30 people.

The programs appeal to all participants who work or plan to work professionally in the field of sports management and sports marketing and who want to improve themselves in this field, and are an important opportunity for those who want to benefit from the course content and international network opportunities offered by LALIGA.

For detailed information and application:

www.scm.khas.edu.tr
